steps.title: Find the focus of every sentence
steps.content: Every sentence centers on the runestone discovered in Norway: how old it is, what it might contain, and what a runologist hopes to learn from it. Zilmer is mentioned, but as a researcher commenting on the runestone — not as the topic herself.

steps.title: Match the topic
steps.content:
C — "A runestone found in Norway" — names the actual subject of the text.

A (battles) is unmentioned. B is too narrow (Zilmer is one detail). D is wrong; the carbon-dating method isn't presented as new.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
